description: Final50 — 50 unique Nasscom evaluation tickets (Amazon, Google, Deloitte, Nike, Tesla). Per-ticket gold labels aligned to content. Zero overlap with Demo20/Clear50.

cases.description: Amazon Seller Central bulk listing upload API returns HTTP 503 for India marketplace sellers. Peak sale event starts in 2 hours.
